name: io.github.GT-dinuo/server-ops-mcp
description: Server ops MCP: logs, monitoring, code edit, Nginx & certs. Local + SSH, confirmations & redaction.
title: Server Ops MCP

environmentVariables.name: OPS_PROJECT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Project root path; all file operations are sandboxed here

environmentVariables.name: OPS_SSH_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Remote server IP / domain; leave empty to run locally

environmentVariables.name: OPS_SSH_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Path to SSH private key (choose either key or password)

environmentVariables.name: OPS_SSH_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SSH password (choose either key or password)

environmentVariables.name: OPS_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to an extra config file (see config.example.json)
